name: Lease Drafting And Execution
description: Leasing stages approved-applicant lease packets, deposit and first-month checklists, and signature tracking with human approval before any applicant-facing send, e-sign action, money collection, or AppFolio write.

stages.name: Normalize Approved Applicant
stages.description: Normalize approved applicant, unit, lease, deposit, and move-in facts.

steps.title: Normalize approved applicant
steps.instructions: Normalize applicant identities, approved occupants, property, unit, lease start, term, rent, deposit, fees, pets, utilities, screening conditions, move-in target, and source confidence. Missing screening, pricing, lease, or AppFolio data must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize approved-applicant lease facts and missing-data flags. No applicant sends, e-sign actions, collections, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Review lease readiness
steps.instructions: Review approved-applicant facts, screening conditions, rent/deposit terms, move-in date, and missing data before lease packet drafting.
steps.human_prompt: Review lease readiness before a lease packet is drafted.

stages.name: Draft Lease Packet
stages.description: Prepare draft-only lease and money checklist artifacts.

steps.title: Draft lease packet checklist
steps.instructions: Draft lease packet checklist with lease terms, occupants, fees, deposit, prorations, pet/ESA notes, utilities, move-in requirements, addenda, and unresolved items. Do not generate or send a legal lease document.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal lease packet checklist only. No applicant send, e-sign action, collection, or AppFolio write.

steps.title: Draft deposit and first-month checklist
steps.instructions: Draft deposit, first-month, prorated rent, fee, and payment timing checklist. Treat all amounts as draft until human approval. Do not request or collect money.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft deposit and first-month checklist. No payment request, collection, or accounting write.

steps.title: Check unit final readiness
steps.instructions: Check make-ready completion, open work orders, locks, keys, utilities, smoke/CO where applicable, safety blockers, and move-in caveats. Do not mark the unit ready in AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_title: Check final unit readiness for lease execution
steps.dispatch_body: Check unit readiness and blockers. No system writes.

stages.name: Approve Lease Release
stages.description: Human approval gates before lease, money, or applicant-facing actions.

steps.title: Approve lease packet release
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, hold, or reject lease packet terms, addenda, move-in money checklist, and unit readiness before any applicant-facing send, e-sign packet, or collection action.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before lease packet release, e-sign action, applicant send, or money collection.

steps.title: Stage approved lease release
steps.instructions: Stage approved lease packet metadata, signing checklist, applicant message draft, deposit/first-month checklist, and move-in caveats for operator release. Do not send, e-sign, collect money, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved lease release metadata only. No applicant send, e-sign, collection, or AppFolio write.

stages.name: Track Execution
stages.description: Track signature, payment, and move-in readiness status without external actions.

steps.title: Track signature and payment status
steps.instructions: Track signature status, deposit status, first-month status, missing items, applicant blockers, and move-in caveats from approved/operator-provided refs. Do not send reminders or collect money.
steps.dispatch_body: Track signature and payment status metadata. No applicant sends or collections.

steps.title: Handoff move-in completion
steps.instructions: Stage internal handoff facts for application-screening-move-in completion or move-in readiness: lease refs, signature status, payment status, unit readiness, blockers, and needs_verification flags. Do not create records or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage internal move-in handoff. No record creation, external sends, or AppFolio writes.
